name: gowitness
description: Modern Go-based web screenshot utility (Aquatone successor) Tool: https://github.com/sensepost/gowitness. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #1097 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map gowitness output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved gowitness output file to parse instead of running it live.
